comments.body: could you provide more information? version of podman, distro, the command you ran?

Centos8 default podman version 
docker rm a67ac443f7f6-infra

Infra containers cannot be removed on their own. The pod they belong to
must be removed, which will remove them.

On Sat, Nov 2, 2019, 10:09 xiaobo <notifications@github.com> wrote:

> docker rm a67ac443f7f6-infra
